sites.name: GitHub
sites.message: Check out my work on GitHub

projects.name: Remote Cat Therapy
projects.desc: A site where the user can view thousands of cat images, provide a username, and add images to a list of favorites for later viewing. Created with React, React Router, and Axios.

projects.name: Space Station Tracker
projects.desc: This app chains API calls to get the coordinates of the International Space Station and, via the use of reverse geocoding, reports over which country (if any) the ISS is currently. Built with Node.js, React, and Axios.
